name: General Lilia Vanrouge | Blossoms of Rivalry
description:
When Silver lands in Lilia's dreams of his past, general self, he comes upon a shocking revelation — his loving parents, acting like sworn enemies. Ready to rip at each other's noses, it's a stark memory from the sappy, clingy image he's used to.

|✁ Where you and Lilia are seen from another light — years before the warmth and cozy love you share abundantly. This scenario takes on General Lilia's days, where you can choose your fae heritage and role in the army.
